name: Arezzo Industria e Comercio S.A.
summary: Arezzo Ind√É¬∫stria e Com√É¬©rcio S.A., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the manufacture, development, molding, and sale of women's footwear, handbags, clothing, and accessories. The company offers its products under the Arezzo, Schutz, Anacapri, Alexandre Birman, and Fiever brands. As of December 31, 2019, it had 630 franchise-operated stores, and 45 company-operated stores in Brazil. The company also sells its products through Web commerce channel. Arezzo Ind√É¬∫stria e Com√É¬©rcio S.A. was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Belo Horizonte, Brazil.
